top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name, MIN(lt.time) AS best_lap_time
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name
ORDER BY best_lap_time ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name, MIN(lt.time) AS best_lap_time
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name
ORDER BY best_lap_time ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH best_lap AS (
  SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    r.name AS race_name, 
    lt.time AS lap_time
  FROM lapTimes lt
  JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
  JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
  WHERE lt.time IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY lt.time ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT forename, surname, race_name, lap_time
FROM best_lap;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name, lt.time AS best_lap_time
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name, MIN(lt.time) AS best_lap_time
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name
ORDER BY best_lap_time ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH best_lap AS (
  SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    r.name AS race_name, 
    lt.time AS lap_time
  FROM lapTimes lt
  JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
  JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
  WHERE lt.time IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY lt.time ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT forename, surname, race_name, lap_time
FROM best_lap;

WITH best_lap AS (
  SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    r.name AS race_name, 
    lt.time AS lap_time,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY lt.time ASC) AS lap_rank
  FROM lapTimes lt
  JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
  JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
  WHERE lt.time IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT forename, surname, race_name, lap_time
FROM best_lap
WHERE lap_rank = 1;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.name, MIN(lt.time) AS best_lap_time
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.name
ORDER BY best_lap_time ASC
LIMIT 1;
